message:
feat(service): add reconnect and hedge middleware layers (asupersync-1zjol)

Reconnect layer with MakeService factory for auto-reconnecting services.
Hedge layer for latency reduction via backup requests after a delay
threshold. Reconnect: 18 tests. Hedge: 19 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
